summary: Comprehensive backend + mobile frontend testing of DairyNest (3-in-1 customer/agent/admin app). All 33 pytest backend tests passed (100%) covering auth, products, subscriptions, autopay, cart/coupons, checkout, referrals, billing, tickets, AI insights, agent route/attendance/performance, admin dashboard/customers/orders/products/inventory/coupons/tickets, role isolation, and AI demand forecast. Mobile UI (390x844 viewport) verified for all three role flows: Customer login (9000000001) → Home (greeting, hero banner, quick actions, today's delivery, AI insight ₹900 est. monthly + 500ml recommended) → Subscription tab (AutoPay banner, active 500ml Cow Milk sub, milk products list) → Rewards (referral code NEERAJ416, share buttons, funnel) → Catalog (vegetables grid with category chips & + add buttons). Agent login (9000000002) → Route tab shows 4 seeded stops in Green Meadows apartment (A-204/B-101/C-305) with Delivered/Failed action buttons + Total/Delivered/Pending/Failed KPI strip. Admin login (9000000003) → Dashboard with full KPI grid (Total Revenue ₹665, 2 customers, 1 active sub, 4 today's orders) and 7-day sales chart. OTP dev-mode (123456) works as designed; Twilio falls back correctly. Razorpay LIVE = true; real test orders created at checkout (razorpay_order_id confirmed in response). Emergent LLM (Gemini 3 Flash) returns real insight text & admin forecast. No deprecated expo packages detected (no expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch). Minor RN-Web console warnings only.

minor.issue: EMERGENT LLM (Gemini 3 Flash) is returning fallback text only — backend log shows: 'litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0033975, Max budget: 0.001'. Endpoint still returns 200 because llm_text() gracefully falls back to canned strings. Real LLM output is not reaching users. Action: increase EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget or rotate key.

issues: Console warns: deprecated 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow), deprecated props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents), deprecated Image style.resizeMode (use props.resizeMode), useNativeDriver not supported on web. All are non-blocking RN-Web warnings but worth migrating for cleanliness.

action_items: (Optional polish) Replace deprecated style props in shared theme/components: 'shadow*' → boxShadow, style.resizeMode → props.resizeMode on <Image>, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents. Strictly RN-Web hygiene; native build unaffected.
(Optional polish) Quick action testIDs use short keys (quick-veg, quick-fruit, quick-bill, quick-pause, quick-milk). Document so future tests match. App functionality is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1228 lines - functional but consider splitting into routers (auth, products, subscriptions, cart, orders, agent, admin) for maintainability.
Razorpay confirm-payment endpoint trusts client without signature verification (acceptable given Expo Go simulation note, but real production must verify razorpay_signature).
/admin/orders/{oid}/assign uses query param agent_id instead of body - works but less RESTful.
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via clean() helper. JWT auth + role guard implemented correctly.
No hardcoded URLs. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is read everywhere. Env keys preserved.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical flows (customer/agent/admin login + role-correct landing screens + sub/rewards/catalog rendering verified)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Backend self-seeds products (14), coupons (3 - WELCOME50/FRESH20/MILK10), demo users (3), and 3 demo orders out_for_delivery for the agent today. A 4th test order was created via checkout test and assigned by admin during test run (visible in agent route screenshot as 4 stops).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_dairynest.py is full regression. Run with: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/test_dairynest.py -v. OTP dev code 123456 always works. Demo phones: 9000000001 (customer), 9000000002 (agent), 9000000003 (admin). All testIDs documented inline in screens. Razorpay order creation is REAL (test keys); only payment confirmation is simulated via /orders/{id}/confirm-payment.
